title: The Comfort Zone
body:
![A green couch made of pillows](https://i.imgur.com/CsqnS9n.png)

## This mod brings pillows to the modern versions of Minecraft!

- Crafted with 4 feathers!

- Reduce all fall damage with bouncy landings!

- Players can sit in them! Produce a redstone signal receivable by a redstone comparator.

- Feather particles that spread from high falls and explosions!

- Deal no damage and extra knockback when attacking entities and players. Pillow fight!

- Cats will seek out and sleep on pillows, even when seated!
